description_long: This is a modern, cubic house with a flat roof, set on a landscaped plot featuring a driveway, carport, and various trees and shrubs. The house exterior alternates between stark black and white facades, with large rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern. The front of the house includes a transparent carport sheltering two vehicles and a paved driveway leading to the main entrance. The property is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn, with a small gazebo and outdoor seating area visible in the garden. The roof appears accessible and partially open, suggesting a possible rooftop terrace or garden. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern, cubic house with black and white facades, flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard with a carport and garden features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black facade, main entrance, carport with two cars, and several trees in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white facade, carport, and a large expanse of lawn with scattered trees and a gazebo.
description_view_2: Rear view with a white wall, garden area, visible gazebo, and more landscaping details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the black facade, additional greenery, and the side of the house with fewer windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, paved approach, and adjacent transparent carport; minimal decorative elements.
